title: Language Model Builder — Build models. Understand AI.
excerpt: Language Model Builder is a free Mac app that walks you through building a small language model from scratch: train a tokenizer, pick your data, pre-train, fine-tune, and chat with a model that you made.
content_html:
Learn how to build AI from scratch (for free!)

Free download. No account, no subscription. Apple Silicon, macOS 15 or later.

Train your own language model

One of the best ways to understand technology, especially when it seems like magic, is to build a small version yourself. Language Model Builder explains the foundations behind mainstream AI tools and lets you build models from scratch. Choose a tokenizer and training data, watch the loss fall during pre-training, teach the model to answer questions, and end up chatting with something that you made.

Interactive textbook

A short textbook with interactive playgrounds

I often find myself explaining how language models are built and trained to friends and family. I finally wrote the introduction I always wanted: It’s friendly to non-programmers, contains many interactive examples, and covers all the fundamentals without treating the reader like a child or a machine learning expert.

  • Interactive from the first page

    Run the experiments yourself: build a tokenizer, move through embedding space, inspect attention, and watch a tiny model learn.

  • Go as deep as you like

    No coding, machine learning, or math experience required. Where useful, I’ve added opportunities for those curious to dive a little deeper.

  • No artificial additives

    The educational content is only as long as it needs to be, without generated filler content.

Native training workbench

MLX

Train a GPT on your Mac.

Run the entire model creation pipeline directly on your Mac, with hardware-accelerated MLX, without installing any additional tools. Every major step comes with beautifully crafted tools that you’ll love.

  • The whole training pipeline

    Pre-train with a data set of your choice, sample the base model, run supervised fine-tuning and direct preference optimization, then chat with the model you made.

  • See the run as it happens

    Follow loss, throughput, validation, saved samples, and checkpoint history without stitching together scripts. It’s really fun to watch your model become more and more capable.

  • Fully local & free

    Resume from a saved checkpoint tomorrow. Your models, datasets, and training history stay on your Mac. No accounts, no cloud, no bill.

Contents

  1. Language modelsnext-word prediction, n-grams, RNNs
  2. Tokenizationhow text becomes numbers
  3. Embeddingshow numbers acquire meaning
  4. Attentionhow words take in their context
  5. The transformerthe architecture inside every modern model
  6. Training dataweb crawls, filtering, deduplication
  7. Loss & gradient descenthow a model actually learns
  8. Fine-tuningteaching by example (SFT), then by preference (DPO)

ToolsAccelerated training with Apple’s MLX

01 · Training

A training run you can watch.

Pre-training, supervised fine-tuning, direct preference optimization, and sampling — all in-process, on your Mac. Watch the loss curve fall, teach the model your taste and preferences, then compare different model settings.

02 · Data

A catalog of good data.

Curated datasets for both pre-training and fine-tuning, each explained and one click away: bigger corpora for pre-training; friendly chats, human-written instructions, and math problems for fine-tuning. Also, obviously, full support for your own data sets.

03 · Chat

Talk to your creation

If you’ve never had the pleasure, it’s hard to describe just how fun it is to talk to a model that you’ve made. Language Model Builder allows you to chat in a pretty environment that also allows deep inspection - like token probabilities and tokens not chosen, for instance.

What kind of model can I actually build with this?

Using the default settings, you’ll get a model that writes coherent, grammatical multi-paragraph text in as little as a day. On a MacBook Pro M5 Max you could train a GPT-2-small-class model (~100–150M parameters on a few billion tokens) in about a week. It might be obvious, but to avoid disappointment: you will not train a Claude Fable 5 or ChatGPT 5.6 Sol in your garage.

Can I stop training and come back later?

Yes. Training runs save checkpoints as they go, so you can stop at any point and resume from a saved checkpoint tomorrow — or keep an earlier checkpoint around to compare against.

Does anything leave my Mac?

No. Your models, datasets, and training history stay on your Mac. There is no cloud component and no account — the model you chat with at the end exists nowhere but your own machine.

Can I share the models I made?

Yes! Language Model Builder creates files in the standardized “safetensors” format. Your friends can either open it in an app of their choice or directly with Language Model Builder.

Why is this app free?

Because I like building things and this app was fun to build. I am fortunate enough that I don’t need to sell it. In any case, I hear there’s very little money to be made by building educational software anyway. If you want to repay me, just send me a quick thanks, it’ll make my day.

When will you release a version for Windows, Linux, or Intel Macs?

Language Model Builder is a native macOS app that heavily relies on Apple’s machine learning framework MLX, which requires an Apple Silicon chip. I do not expect this app to be very popular, but if it somehow does, I might make ports to other platforms.

Go on then, build a language model.

Free download. No account, no subscription.

blocks.html_en: No. Your models, datasets, and training history stay on your Mac. There is no cloud component and no account — the model you chat with at the end exists nowhere but your own machine.

sentences.zh: 不会。您的模型、数据集和训练历史记录都保留在您的 Mac 上。

sentences.en: There is no cloud component and no account — the model you chat with at the end exists nowhere but your own machine.
sentences.zh: 没有云组件，也没有帐户——你最后聊天的模型除了你自己的机器之外别处都存在。

blocks.html_en: Yes! Language Model Builder creates files in the standardized “safetensors” format. Your friends can either open it in an app of their choice or directly with Language Model Builder.

sentences.en: Yes!
sentences.zh: 是的！

sentences.en: Language Model Builder creates files in the standardized “safetensors” format.
sentences.zh: 语言模型生成器以标准化的“safetensors”格式创建文件。

sentences.en: Your friends can either open it in an app of their choice or directly with Language Model Builder.
sentences.zh: 您的朋友可以在他们选择的应用程序中打开它，也可以直接使用语言模型生成器打开它。

blocks.html_en: Because I like building things and this app was fun to build. I am fortunate enough that I don’t need to sell it. In any case, I hear there’s very little money to be made by building educational software anyway. If you want to repay me, just send me a quick thanks, it’ll make my day.

sentences.en: Because I like building things and this app was fun to build.
sentences.zh: 因为我喜欢构建东西，而且构建这个应用程序很有趣。

sentences.en: I am fortunate enough that I don’t need to sell it.
sentences.zh: 我很幸运，我不需要卖掉它。

sentences.en: In any case, I hear there’s very little money to be made by building educational software anyway.
sentences.zh: 无论如何，我听说构建教育软件赚的钱很少。

sentences.en: If you want to repay me, just send me a quick thanks, it’ll make my day.
sentences.zh: 如果您想报答我，请快速向我表示感谢，这会让我很开心。

blocks.html_en: Language Model Builder is a native macOS app that heavily relies on Apple’s machine learning framework MLX, which requires an Apple Silicon chip. I do not expect this app to be very popular, but if it somehow does, I might make ports to other platforms.

sentences.en: Language Model Builder is a native macOS app that heavily relies on Apple’s machine learning framework MLX, which requires an Apple Silicon chip.
sentences.zh: Language Model Builder 是一款原生 macOS 应用程序，严重依赖 Apple 的机器学习框架 MLX，该框架需要 Apple Silicon 芯片。

sentences.en: I do not expect this app to be very popular, but if it somehow does, I might make ports to other platforms.
sentences.zh: 我不认为这个应用程序会很受欢迎，但如果它以某种方式流行，我可能会移植到其他平台。

blocks.html_en: Go on then, build a language model.

sentences.en: Go on then, build a language model.
sentences.zh: 然后继续构建语言模型。

blocks.html_en: Free download. No account, no subscription.

sentences.en: Free download.
sentences.zh: 免费下载。

sentences.en: No account, no subscription.
sentences.zh: 没有帐户，没有订阅。

content_html_zh:
了解如何从头开始构建人工智能（免费！）

免费下载。 没有帐户，没有订阅。 Apple Silicon、macOS 15 或更高版本。

训练自己的语言模型

理解技术的最佳方法之一，尤其是当它看起来像魔法时，就是自己构建一个小版本。 语言模型生成器解释了主流人工智能工具背后的基础，并让您从头开始构建模型。 选择分词器和训练数据，观察预训练期间损失的下降，教模型回答问题，最后与您制作的内容进行聊天。

互动教材

带有互动游乐场的简短教科书

我经常发现自己向朋友和家人解释语言模型是如何构建和训练的。 我终于写出了我一直想要的介绍：它对非程序员友好，包含许多交互式示例，涵盖了所有基础知识，而不把读者当作孩子或机器学习专家。

  • 从第一页开始进行互动自己运行实验：构建一个分词器，在嵌入空间中移动，检查注意力，并观察一个微型模型的学习。
  • 随心所欲地深入无需编码、机器学习或数学经验。 在有用的地方，我为那些好奇的人提供了更深入研究的机会。
  • 无人工添加剂教育内容仅是需要的内容，没有生成的填充内容。

原生训练工作台

MLX

在 Mac 上训练 GPT。

使用硬件加速的 MLX 直接在 Mac 上运行整个模型创建管道，无需安装任何其他工具。 每个主要步骤都配有您一定会喜欢的制作精美的工具。

  • 整个训练流程使用您选择的数据集进行预训练，对基本模型进行采样，运行监督微调和直接偏好优化，然后与您制作的模型进行聊天。
  • 查看运行情况，跟踪损失、吞吐量、验证、保存的样本和检查点历史记录，无需将脚本拼接在一起。 看着你的模型变得越来越有能力真的很有趣。
  • 完全本地且免费明天从保存的检查点恢复。 您的模型、数据集和训练历史记录保留在您的 Mac 上。 没有账户，没有云，没有账单。

内容

  1. 语言模型下一个单词预测、n-gram、RNN
  2. 标记化文本如何变成数字
  3. 嵌入显示数字具有意义
  4. 注意单词在上下文中的含义
  5. Transformer——每个现代模型中的架构
  6. 训练数据网络爬行、过滤、重复数据删除
  7. 损失和梯度下降模型实际上是如何学习的
  8. 微调教学（SFT），然后按偏好（DPO）

工具使用 Apple 的 MLX 加速培训

01·培训

您可以观看训练跑步。

预训练、监督微调、直接偏好优化和采样——所有这些都在您的 Mac 上进行。 观察损失曲线下降，告诉模型你的品味和偏好，然后比较不同的模型设置。

02 · Data

良好数据的目录。

用于预训练和微调的精选数据集，每个数据集都有解释，只需单击一下即可：用于预训练的更大语料库；友好的聊天、人工编写的说明以及用于微调的数学问题。 另外，显然，完全支持您自己的数据集。

03 · Chat

谈论你的创作

如果您从未享受过这种乐趣，那么很难描述与您制作的模型交谈是多么有趣。 语言模型生成器允许您在一个漂亮的环境中聊天，该环境还允许进行深入检查 - 例如标记概率和未选择的标记。

What kind of model can I actually build with this?

使用默认设置，您将获得一个模型，该模型可以在短短一天内编写连贯、符合语法的多段落文本。 在 MacBook Pro M5 Max 上，您可以在大约一周内训练 GPT-2 小类模型（数十亿个代币上的约 100-150M 参数）。 这可能是显而易见的，但为了避免失望：您不会在车库中训练 Claude Fable 5 或 ChatGPT 5.6 Sol。

Can I stop training and come back later?

是的。 训练运行时会保存检查点，因此您可以随时停止并在明天从保存的检查点恢复 - 或者保留较早的检查点以进行比较。

Does anything leave my Mac?

不会。您的模型、数据集和训练历史记录都保留在您的 Mac 上。 没有云组件，也没有帐户——你最后聊天的模型除了你自己的机器之外别处都存在。

Can I share the models I made?

是的！ 语言模型生成器以标准化的“safetensors”格式创建文件。 您的朋友可以在他们选择的应用程序中打开它，也可以直接使用语言模型生成器打开它。

Why is this app free?

因为我喜欢构建东西，而且构建这个应用程序很有趣。 我很幸运，我不需要卖掉它。 无论如何，我听说构建教育软件赚的钱很少。 如果您想报答我，请快速向我表示感谢，这会让我很开心。

When will you release a version for Windows, Linux, or Intel Macs?

Language Model Builder 是一款原生 macOS 应用程序，严重依赖 Apple 的机器学习框架 MLX，该框架需要 Apple Silicon 芯片。 我不认为这个应用程序会很受欢迎，但如果它以某种方式流行，我可能会移植到其他平台。

然后继续构建语言模型。

免费下载。 没有帐户，没有订阅。
